# Sale invoice Policy

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:df73106a5e170c2880b7b8185aa7e5ed36ed8aebc9ba66e7344fd72e5b60d982
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This modules helps to get Invoicing Policy on Sale Order Level without
breaking behaviour (as it is defined from >= v10 on product level).

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Usage

- Create Sale Order
- Select Invoicing Policy on Sale Order or let it void
- Either the policy selected on Sale Order would be used, either if not
  filled in, the policy would be chosen from product configuration

## Bug Tracker

Bugs are tracked on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/OCA/sale-workflow/issues).
In case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been reported.
If you spotted it first, help us to smash it by providing a detailed and welcomed
[feedback](https://github.com/OCA/sale-workflow/issues/new?body=module:%20sale_invoice_policy%0Aversion:%2014.0%0A%0A**Steps%20to%20reproduce**%0A-%20...%0A%0A**Current%20behavior**%0A%0A**Expected%20behavior**).

Do not contact contributors directly about support or help with technical issues.

methods.name: odoo.addons.sale_invoice_policy.models.product_template.ProductTemplate._compute_invoice_policy
documentation:
Apply the invoice_policy given by context (if exist) otherwise use the
default invoice policy given by the field with this same name.
If the product is type = 'service', we don't have to apply the invoice
policy given by the context. Ex: shipping costs.
:return:

functions.name: odoo.addons.sale_invoice_policy.pre_init_hook.pre_init_hook
documentation:
As we change the invoice policy to computed field, we must initialize
the default policy with original values

methods.name: odoo.addons.sale_invoice_policy.tests.test_sale_invoice_policy.TestSaleOrderInvoicePolicy.test_sale_order_invoice_order
documentation: Test invoicing based on ordered quantities

methods.name: odoo.addons.sale_invoice_policy.tests.test_sale_invoice_policy.TestSaleOrderInvoicePolicy.test_sale_order_invoice_deliver
documentation: Test invoicing based on delivered quantities

methods.name: odoo.addons.sale_invoice_policy.tests.test_sale_invoice_policy.TestSaleOrderInvoicePolicy.test_sale_order_invoice_policy_service1
documentation:
For this test, we check if the invoice policy is correctly updated
(into the product) when the type is 'service'.
The behaviour should be:
\- Get the value of the context but if the type is 'service': use the
default_invoice_policy field value
\:return: bool
